Title: Per-Agent Model Configuration
Description:
Add model, temperature, and max_tokens to the agent record so each agent carries its own API call parameters. Remove the api block from ASTRAL_CONFIG entirely тАФ these settings no longer belong in code.

**Acceptance Criteria:**

**config.py Changes:**
- Remove the `api` block from ASTRAL_CONFIG entirely
- Add a top-level `models` list to config.py with the following shape per entry:
  - `model_label` тАФ human-readable name (e.g. "Haiku", "Sonnet", "Opus")
  - `model_code` тАФ Anthropic API string (e.g. `claude-haiku-4-5-20251001`)
  - `cpm_input` тАФ cost per million input tokens (float)
  - `cpm_output` тАФ cost per million output tokens (float)
  - `default_temperature` тАФ sensible default for this model (float)
  - `default_max_tokens` тАФ sensible default for this model (int)
- Seed with current Haiku, Sonnet, and Opus models and their published pricing

**database.py / agent Table Changes:**
- ALTER agent table to add three columns:
  - `model_code` тАФ TEXT (FK by convention to models list in config)
  - `temperature` тАФ REAL
  - `max_tokens` тАФ INTEGER
- `get_agent()` returns all three new fields alongside existing fields
- Schema migration adds columns to existing databases idempotently

**cost_calculator.py Changes:**
- Remove hardcoded Sonnet 4.5 pricing constants
- `calculate_cost_with_cache(usage, model_code)` тАФ looks up cpm_input and cpm_output from config models list by model_code
- `calculate_cost(usage, model_code)` тАФ same, simple variant
- Raises ValueError if model_code not found in config

**Manage Agents Screen (UI тАФ Admin > Manage Agents):**
- Add model selector to agent edit form тАФ dropdown populated from config models list
- On model selection, pre-populate temperature and max_tokens from config defaults (editable)
- Display current model, temperature, max_tokens in agent list columns
- Add delete agent action to list (row action: Delete тЖТ confirmation modal тЖТ DELETE endpoint)
- Save writes model_code, temperature, max_tokens back to agent record

**API Endpoints:**
- GET /api/admin/models тАФ returns config models list (for dropdown population)
- PUT /api/admin/agents/:agent_id тАФ updated to accept and save model_code, temperature, max_tokens
- DELETE /api/admin/agents/:agent_id тАФ delete agent record

**Notes:**
- No fallback model anywhere тАФ if an agent record is missing model_code the system should surface an error, not silently default
- Chuckles to seed existing agent records with appropriate model_code, temperature, max_tokens as part of migration

**Database:**
- agent table: ALTER to add model_code, temperature, max_tokens columns
- database.py module docstring updated per ASTRAL_CODE_RULES 1.1

Title: Consult Uses Agent Model
Description:
Update consult.py and anthropic.py so that API call parameters (model, temperature, max_tokens) flow from the agent record rather than global config. The api block is being removed from ASTRAL_CONFIG тАФ callers must supply all parameters explicitly or the system hard-fails.

**Acceptance Criteria:**

**consult.py Changes:**
- When fetching the agent record for a task, read `model_code`, `temperature`, and `max_tokens` from the agent row
- Pass all three explicitly to `do_task` (or the underlying `_fetch_response`) as named parameters
- Raise a clear ValueError if any of the three are missing or None on the agent record тАФ no silent fallback

**anthropic.py Changes:**
- `_fetch_response` requires `model`, `temperature`, and `max_tokens` as explicit parameters тАФ no defaults, no fallback to config
- Remove all references to `ASTRAL_CONFIG['api']`
- Hard crash (raise ValueError) if any of the three are not provided by the caller
- `calculate_cost_with_cache` call updated to pass `model_code` per the updated cost_calculator.py signature

**Notes:**
- This issue depends on: Per-Agent Model Configuration (Astral Admin)
- The intent is zero tolerance for misconfiguration тАФ a mis-configured agent should fail loudly at runtime, not silently use a wrong or expensive model
- Chuckles to verify all callers of do_task / _fetch_response after this change and confirm no other callers are broken

**Database:**
- No schema changes in this issue
- database.py module docstring updated per ASTRAL_CODE_RULES 1.1 if touched
